name: Curtis Fowlkes
abstract: Curtis Fowlkes (March 19, 1950 – August 31, 2023) was an American jazz trombonist and singer. He was a founding member of The Jazz Passengers.

concerts.label: An Evening with Glen Hansard
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Alvin Queen
about_quotes.evidence: we had ... Curtis Fowlkes trombone ... So it was a good tour.
about_quotes.doc_title: Alvin Queen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 23, 1997 [interview 1 of 2]
